content:
1. Generates a monthly article summary report for a specific month and optional categories. It exists as a quick, unvalidated demo.

2. The N+1 database query pattern for fetching authors. Also, in-memory category filtering (which loads all monthly articles before filtering) and the manual December-to-January date boundary logic.

3. Whether the code holds up in production, specifically whether to batch-fetch authors and push category filtering down into the SQL.

4. Missing authors causing a crash on `author["name"]`, and memory exhaustion from loading all articles into memory before applying category filters.
